text.title: QA Flake Ledger Template Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-flake-ledger-template methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: ingest-ci
step.action: Pull last 30d test results; compute per-test fail/run; emit new/updated rows.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Match test path to owner; reject rows that cannot be matched (needs CODEOWNERS update).

step.name: apply-state
step.action: Promote to quarantine if fail_rate>5% over ≥10 runs; demote if 7d clean.

step.name: commit-ledger
step.action: Write versioned file (csv or markdown) to repo; open burndown tickets.

step.name: review-weekly
step.action: Walk rows; decide fix/delete for stale quarantines; close fixed ones.
